texto: ...a soft inward look some into his eyes, as if he was amazed to find himself alive on such a beautiful day.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Sarah Porter: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “...a soft inward look some into his eyes, as if he was amazed to find himself alive on such a bea…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que autoestima, alive, amazed pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de amazed e beautiful-day.

texto: After a while Luce curled up with her head leaning on a rock, wondering why she wasn't consumed with despair. Instead she felt an inexplicable sense of peace. She was cradled in music. The rocks around her chanted like slow, growling bells, and each curl of the water stroked her fins with silky notes. She'd been so afraid of leaving her tribe, but she understood that she never would have heard the music resonating out of every crook of the world if she hadn't taken so many risks. She'd opened her heart to the music of solitude, and it had come to her.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Sarah Porter: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “After a while Luce curled up with her head leaning on a rock, wondering why she wasn't consumed w…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, fantasy-ya, mermaid-magic pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de mermaid-magic e mermaids.

frase_original: After a while Luce curled up with her head leaning on a rock, wondering why she wasn't consumed with despair. Instead she felt an inexplicable sense of peace. She was cradled in music. The rocks around her chanted like slow, growling bells, and each curl of the water stroked her fins with silky notes. She'd been so afraid of leaving her tribe, but she understood that she never would have heard the music resonating out of every crook of the world if she hadn't taken so many risks. She'd opened her heart to the music of solitude, and it had come to her.
